title: SΔϕ-06 - Responsibility as Irreversible Cost Internalization
package_title: SΔϕ-06 - Responsibility as Irreversible Cost Internalization: Cost Attribution, Repair TCC, and Responsibility Completion AI-Readable Package
creator: Sofience
type: AI-readable package / working paper / responsibility irreversible cost internalization audit module
core_claim: Responsibility is not blame, guilt, apology, punishment, personhood, or legal liability by itself. Responsibility is irreversible cost internalization through attribution, repair/re-entry, and recurrence-cost reduction.

primary_formulae.expanded: Responsibility = Irreversibility + Cost Attribution + Cost Internalization + Repair/Re-entry + Recurrence-Cost Reduction
primary_formulae.short: Responsibility = ownership of irreversible path constraint
primary_formulae.tcc_underlayer: Use SDeltaPhi-56 v1.3 to measure repair/re-entry/disclosure TCC.

do_not_use_as: replacement for TCC analysis when repair is central
